examples: The event in Toronto this week was not a frontiersman's gathering, however, but the world's biggest mining gabfest.
Hillary Clinton, on the other hand, is paired with Barbara Walters, host of the television gabfest The View.
Germans gave us frankfurter, hamburger, delicatessen, sauerkraut, noodle, pumpernickel, pretzel, kindergarden, dunk, dumb, loafer, bum, gabfest and slugfest.
